_meta.description: Canonical managers for the KDP 'Go Cougs' league. Keys match the JS keys used in the report's h2hData and MANAGERS map. All-time records are REGULAR SEASON ONLY, 2009-2025 (17 seasons), RECOMPUTED from data/seasons/*.json by scripts/recompute.mjs — superseding the report's table (which predated the 2009/2010/2019 corrections).
_meta.source: data/seasons/*.json + data/champions.json via scripts/recompute.mjs; naming history from STATUS.md
_meta.winPctNote: winPct = w/(w+l)*100, computed from the recomputed W-L.
_meta.allTimeAggregatesCaveat: Recomputed from data/seasons/*.json (regular season) + champions.json by scripts/recompute.mjs. Playoff appearances = seasons finishing in the playoff seeds (top 6 in 2009-2010, top 4 from 2011). Titles from champions.json. 2010 PF/PA are rounded (standings-only source).
_meta.playoffRecordsNote: m.playoff = all-time POST-SEASON record (championship bracket only: games among the seeded playoff teams, incl. 3rd/5th-place games; consolation games between non-playoff teams are excluded). Covers every season 2009-2025; the 2010 bracket was scraped from Yahoo (2010/f1/264678, wks 14-16) since no legacy file exists. appearances/titles mirror allTime.

managers.notes: KDP debut 2019. Was mislabeled 'Ryan' (rmath23@hotmail.com) in early builds; the h2hData key is 'Rudee'. Distinct from 'Ryan C' (RyanC).
Original 2009 member. Most wins all-time among never-champions.
Absent 2019-2021 (3 seasons); 14 seasons total, incl. 2010 (Falcon & The Snowman). Most titles all-time (4).

JS key is 'Larson' but displays as 'Robbie'. Historical/alumni; no 2025 team. 2013 champion. 8 seasons: 2012-2019 (NOT 2009, NOT 2011). Corrections by Patrick (2026-07): 2011 'liverpoolsucks69' was actually Kyle P (not Larson), and 2019's hidden team was mislabeled 'Antony' in SCHED_2019 but is Larson.
Formerly keyed 'Kyle'. Distinct from Kyle P ('Kyle2').
Full name Jeremy Trevino. 2025 & 2023 champion (2 titles).
Original 2009 member. 17 seasons (incl. 2010 = Marvelous FarveLess), 126-115 all-time (recomputed).
Distinct from Rudee. 2018 champion. In 2011 as the hidden 'Kibbles and Vicks' and in 2010 as 'Einhorn is Finkle!' — 17 seasons; 123-118 all-time (recomputed).
Commissioner. 2009 champion. 3 titles. Finished last (3-12) in 2025.

David WAS in 2009 as the hidden team 'cougs4bcsbid' (old data mislabeled that slot 'Larson' and wrongly placed David on 'Team Malaysia'). Confirmed by Patrick (2026-07). Recomputed: 17 seasons (2009 + 2010 + 2011-2025) and 2 titles (2010 & 2020) — the report knew only 2020 because 2010 was missing, which is why it showed David with 1 title / 'Since 11'.
The site owner. Original 2009 member. 2015 champion. Holds the most all-time losses (135) and the 2021 loss records.

Formerly keyed 'Kyle2'. Debuted 2010 (ihatethecowboys) and played 2011 (liverpoolsucks69) — both hidden slots, confirmed by Patrick (2026-07) — then 2012-2021 continuous; not in 2022-2025. 12 seasons, 1 title.

Promoted to a tracked manager by Patrick (2026-07); previously the hidden 'Team Malaysia'/'Irfan Since 05' slot. 2 seasons: 2009 (Team Malaysia, 6-7, full weekly data + H2H) and 2010 (Teeth Malaysia, 7-6, standings-only). No titles.

One-off manager, 2010 only (Too Good, 2-11) — a hidden slot even on Yahoo, identified by Patrick (2026-07). Abandoned the team mid-season (stopped setting a lineup), so by Patrick's decision (2026-07) he is EXCLUDED from the all-time Record Book: his 22.36 low week and all his games are dropped from records (see scripts/build-records.mjs). Still counts in standings/H2H/career table. No titles.

namingHistory.Rudee: 'Ryan' (rmath23@hotmail.com) in early builds = Rudee, NOT Ryan C.
namingHistory.Larson: Displays as 'Robbie' in the report despite the 'Larson' key.
namingHistory.David: Identified as scmid 2 in 2009 WaZZU league ('Team Malaysia / Irfan Since 05').
